raw_title: Time in communication research and theories
title_en: Time in communication research and theories
title_zh: 传播研究与理论中的时间
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了时间在传播研究中的重要性，包括人们如何感知时间、媒体如何影响时间观念，以及如何通过长期研究来理解传播效果的变化。
plain_summary_en: This article explores the importance of time in communication research, including how people perceive time, how media influences time concepts, and how longitudinal studies help understand changes in communication effects.
research_direction_zh: 传播学中的时间维度研究，关注时间因素在传播过程、效果和理论构建中的作用。
research_direction_en: Research on the temporal dimension in communication studies, focusing on the role of time factors in communication processes, effects, and theory development.
